plan.goal: 构建 MMS 代码知识图谱系统 - 初次可用版本

tasks.description: 初始化项目结构和 package.json，配置 TypeScript 和依赖
acceptance_criteria: 项目可以 npm install 成功
TypeScript 编译配置正确
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for low config task

tasks.description: 设计 SQLite 数据库 schema：nodes 表（symbol/file）和 edges 表（defines/imports/calls/references）
acceptance_criteria: schema 支持 symbol 和 file 节点类型
schema 支持 defines/imports/calls/references 边类型
包含位置信息（文件、行、列）
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for medium schema task

tasks.description: 实现 SCIP 索引解析器，支持 scip-typescript 和 scip-go 输出格式
acceptance_criteria: 能解析 SCIP protobuf 格式
提取 symbol、position、relationship 信息
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for medium-high algorithms task

tasks.description: 实现 fg-index CLI 工具：调用 SCIP indexer 并写入 SQLite
acceptance_criteria: 支持 --project 参数指定项目路径
自动检测项目类型（ts/go）
调用对应 scip-indexer
将结果写入 SQLite
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for medium api task

tasks.description: 实现 fg-query CLI 工具：支持 findDefinition/findReferences/findCallers 查询
acceptance_criteria: findDefinition <symbol> 返回定义位置
findReferences <symbol> 返回所有引用
findCallers <symbol> 返回调用者列表
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for medium api task

tasks.description: 实现增量更新机制：基于 git diff 检测变更文件
acceptance_criteria: 检测自上次索引以来的变更文件
仅重新索引变更文件
更新数据库中的节点和边
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for medium-high algorithms task

tasks.description: 实现 MindKeeper 整合：session 进入项目时自动触发索引
acceptance_criteria: 检测到项目根目录时检查索引状态
索引过期或不存在时自动触发 fg-index
提供配置项控制自动索引行为
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for medium api task

tasks.description: 在 agent-im 目录构建索引并验证查询功能
acceptance_criteria: agent-im 目录成功构建索引
能回答 handleMessage 定义位置
能回答谁调用了 sendDiscordMessage
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for medium tests task

{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"call_847250e9d81f42dda9e7ca05","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→# Auto-Skills Project Documentation
     2→
     3→A comprehensive automation and deployment toolkit for domain configuration management and CI/CD processes.
     4→
     5→## Project Structure
     6→
     7→```
     8→auto-skills/
     9→├── bin/                    # Executable scripts accessible via PATH
    10→│   ├── deploy             # Main deployment script (SCMP integration)
    11→│   ├── push               # Git push helper with notifications
    12→│   ├── lookup             # Domain/service lookup utility
    13→│   ├── claude-provider    # Claude Code provider script
    14→│   └── figmamcp           # Figma integration script
    15→├── scmp-deploy/           # SCMP (Service Control Management Platform) tools
    16→│   ├── README.md          # Deployment tool documentation
    17→│   └── scripts/
    18→│       ├── scmp_cli.py    # Standalone SCMP CLI
    19→│       └── scmp_api.py    # HTTP API wrapper
    20→├── domain-tool-core/      # Central domain configuration engine
    21→│   ├── index.js           # Main domain tool engine
    22→│   ├── install.js         # Installation script for anchor system
    23→│   ├── MAINTENANCE.md     # Maintenance manual
    24→│   └── package.json       # Dependencies and package info
    25→├── backup/                # Backup configurations and skills
    26→└── .skills/              # Skill configurations
    27→```
    28→
    29→## Core Components
    30→
    31→### 1. Domain Tool Core (`domain-tool-core/`)
    32→
    33→The central engine for domain configuration management that generates JSON configurations from Excel spreadsheets.
    34→
    35→**Key Features:**
    36→- Excel parsing and configuration generation
    37→- Ads mapping system with placeholder syntax
    38→- Dynamic ad slot resolution
    39→- Configuration template support
    40→
    41→**Important Files:**
    42→- `index.js`: Main engine implementation
    43→- `install.js`: Sets up global anchor for cross-project access
    44→- `MAINTENANCE.md`: Complete maintenance and upgrade guide
    45→
    46→**Configuration Syntax (v2.7.0+):**
    47→```javascript
    48→adsMapping: {
    49→  adsense: {
    50→    'home_1': '${home_1}',     // New placeholder syntax
    51→    'list_top': '${list_1}'    // Left: output key, Right: Excel column
    52→  },
    53→  adx: {
    54→    'list_top': '${list_1}',
    55→    'categories[0]': '${list_2}', // Array element support
    56→    'categories[1]': '${list_3}'
    57→  }
    58→}
    59→```
    60→
    61→### 2. SCMP Deploy Tools (`scmp-deploy/`)
    62→
    63→Standalone command-line interface for deploying services through SCMP without opening a browser UI.
    64→
    65→**Features:**
    66→- Authentication token management
    67→- Service discovery and pipeline selection
    68→- Parameter inference from current deployments
    69→- Automated deployment workflows
    70→
    71→**Commands:**
    72→- `login`: Authenticate and save token
    73→- `service`: Search for services
    74→- `pipelines`: List pipelines for a service
    75→- `current`: Get current pipeline run parameters
    76→- `run`: Trigger pipeline run
    77→- `deploy`: One-shot deployment (recommended)
    78→
    79→**Usage:**
    80→```bash
    81→# Login (first time setup)
    82→python3 scmp-deploy/scripts/scmp_cli.py login --share-id "<share_id>" --prompt-password
    83→
    84→# Deploy service (interactive mode)
    85→deploy my-service-name
    86→
    87→# Or direct CLI usage
    88→python3 scmp-deploy/scripts/scmp_cli.py deploy my-service-name --env prod
    89→```
    90→
    91→### 3. Global Scripts (`bin/`)
    92→
    93→#### `deploy` Script
    94→The primary deployment command that wraps `scmp_cli.py`. Can infer service names from the current git repository.
    95→
    96→**Features:**
    97→- Automatic service name detection from `.deploy-service` or `.deploy-name`
    98→- Interactive deployment with intelligent defaults
    99→- Daily token refresh
   100→
   101→#### `push` Script
   102→Enhanced git push workflow with notifications and version bumping.
   103→
   104→**Features:**
   105→- Automatic version incrementation for branch names
   106→- Commit message prompting
   107→- Optional Feishu notifications
   108→- Pre/post hook support
   109→- Automatic `.deploy-service` file creation
   110→
   111→**Usage:**
   112→```bash
   113→# Standard push with commit message
   114→push -m "feat: add new functionality"
   115→
   116→# Push without notifications
   117→push -m "fix: resolve issue" --no-notify
   118→
   119→# Interactive push
   120→push  # Prompts for commit message
   121→```
   122→
   123→#### `lookup` Script
   124→Domain and service lookup utility for identifying associated services.
   125→
   126→## Setup Instructions
   127→
   128→### Prerequisites
   129→- Node.js >= 14.0.0
   130→- Python 3.x
   131→- Git
   132→
   133→### Initial Setup
   134→
   135→1. **Add bin directory to PATH:**
   136→```bash
   137→echo 'export PATH="/Users/xin/auto-skills/bin:$PATH"' >> ~/.zshrc
   138→source ~/.zshrc
   139→```
   140→
   141→2. **Setup domain-tool-core anchor (if moving/renaming directory):**
   142→```bash
   143→cd /path/to/auto-skills/domain-tool-core
   144→node install.js
   145→```
   146→
   147→3. **SCMP Deployment Setup:**
   148→```bash
   149→# Set your share ID
   150→export SCMP_SHARE_ID='<your-share-id>'
   151→
   152→# Login to SCMP (token stored securely)
   153→python3 scmp-deploy/scripts/scmp_cli.py login --prompt-password
   154→```
   155→
   156→4. **Configure Feishu notifications (optional):**
   157→```bash
   158→export FEISHU_WEBHOOK='<your-feishu-webhook-url>'
   159→export PUSH_NOTIFY=1  # Enable auto-notifications
   160→```
   161→
   162→## Key Workflows
   163→
   164→### 1. Service Deployment Workflow
   165→1. Navigate to your service repository
   166→2. Make your changes
   167→3. Use `push -m "commit message"` to commit and push with version bumping
   168→4. Use `deploy` (infers service name) or `deploy service-name` to deploy
   169→
   170→### 2. Domain Configuration Workflow
   171→1. Prepare Excel spreadsheet with domain configurations
   172→2. Generate configuration using domain-tool-core
   173→3. Review `suggested-config.js` for correct mapping syntax
   174→4. Deploy updated configurations
   175→
   176→### 3. Development Best Practices
   177→- Use meaningful commit messages with conventional prefixes (feat:, fix:, chore:, etc.)
   178→- Always review `suggested-config.js` when updating domain configurations
   179→- Maintain consistent branch naming with version numbers (e.g., `feature-1.2.3`)
   180→- Configure appropriate notification settings for team awareness
   181→
   182→## Security Notes
   183→
   184→- Tokens are stored locally with 0600 permissions
   185→- Passwords are never stored in plain text
   186→- Use `--plain-password` flag carefully as it echoes passwords to terminal
   187→- Regular token refresh mechanism prevents stale authentication
   188→
   189→## Troubleshooting
   190→
   191→- If domain-tool-core path breaks after directory movement, run `node install.js` from the core directory
   192→- For deployment authentication issues, run the login command again
   193→- Check `.deploy-service` file exists in repositories for proper deployment integration
   194→- Review `scmp-deploy/README.md` for detailed troubleshooting of deployment issues
   195→
   196→For more detailed information on specific components, see the individual README files in each directory.

     2→
     3→This document provides a comprehensive overview of the Auto-Skills project architecture, detailing the relationships between components and how they work together.
     4→
     5→## High-Level Architecture
     6→
     7→```

    48→```
    49→
    50→## Component Relationships
    51→
    52→### 1. Domain Tool Core ←→ SCMP Deploy Tools
    53→
    54→The Domain Tool Core and SCMP Deploy Tools work closely together:
    55→
    56→- **Domain Tool Core** generates configuration files that may be deployed using SCMP
    57→- **SCMP Deploy Tools** consume the configuration artifacts produced by Domain Tool Core
    58→- Both use the global anchor system for coordination
    59→- Share common workflow patterns (configuration → validation → deployment)
    60→
    61→### 2. bin/ Scripts ←→ All Components
    62→
    63→The global scripts provide unified access to all components:
    64→
    65→- **deploy** integrates with SCMP Deploy Tools and respects Domain Tool Core outputs
    66→- **push** coordinates git operations across all components
    67→- **lookup** provides unified search across all domain configurations
    68→
    69→### 3. Backup/Skills ←→ Core Components
    70→
    71→Provides safety and extensibility layers:
    72→
    73→- **Backup** preserves configuration states from Domain Tool Core
    74→- **Skills** extend functionality of all core components
    75→- **Templates** provide reusable patterns across the system
    76→
    77→## Data Flow
    78→
    79→### Configuration Generation Workflow
    80→
    81→```
    82→Excel Spreadsheet → Domain Tool Core → JSON Config → SCMP Deploy → Live Service
    83→     │                   │                  │              │            │
    84→     │                   │                  │              │            │
    85→     └───────────────────┤                  │              │            │
    86→                         │                  │              │            │
    87→                         └──────────────────┤              │            │
    88→                                            │              │            │
    89→                                            └──────────────┤            │
    90→                                                           │            │
    91→                                                           └────────────┘
    92→```
    93→
    94→### Deployment Workflow
    95→
    96→```
    97→Git Repo → push Script → Version Bump → Commit → Push → deploy Script → SCMP → Live Service
    98→    │          │            │            │        │         │            │
    99→    │          │            │            │        │         │            │
   100→    └──────────┼────────────┼────────────┼────────┼─────────┼────────────┘
   101→               │            │            │        │         │
   102→               └────────────┼────────────┼────────┼─────────┘
   103→                            │            │        │
   104→                            └────────────┼────────┘
   105→                                         │
   106→                                         └─────────┘
   107→```
   108→
   109→## Architecture Principles
   110→
   111→### 1. Decentralized Access
   112→
   113→- Components can operate independently
   114→- Global anchor system enables coordination without tight coupling
   115→- Scripts provide unified interfaces to decentralized functionality
   116→
   117→### 2. Security First
   118→
   119→- Credentials never stored in plain text
   120→- Tokens managed with proper permissions
   121→- Secure authentication flows
   122→- Minimal data exposure
   123→
   124→### 3. Convention Over Configuration
   125→
   126→- Standard file names (`.deploy-service`, etc.)
   127→- Consistent directory structures
   128→- Predictable behavior based on conventions
   129→- Intelligent defaults based on context
   130→
   131→### 4. Extensibility
   132→
   133→- Hook system for custom behaviors
   134→- Template system for flexible configurations
   135→- Skills system for extended functionality
   136→- Modular architecture enables additions
   137→
   138→## Technical Patterns
   139→
   140→### Global Anchor Pattern
   141→
   142→```
   143→Component A → Reads ~/.domain-tool-core-anchor → Resolves Core Path → Uses Core Functionality
   144→Component B → Reads ~/.domain-tool-core-anchor → Resolves Core Path → Uses Core Functionality
   145→```
   146→
   147→This allows moving the core directory without breaking dependent components.
   148→
   149→### Convention-Based Configuration
   150→
   151→Components use file system conventions to determine behavior:
   152→- `.deploy-service` in git repo → determines deployment target
   153→- Excel column names → map to configuration keys
   154→- Branch names → influence version strategies
   155→
   156→### Progressive Enhancement
   157→
   158→Scripts enhance basic functionality:
   159→- Basic git push → enhanced with versioning, notifications, hooks
   160→- Basic SCMP access → enhanced with authentication, parameter inference
   161→- Basic lookups → enhanced with domain intelligence
   162→
   163→## Integration Points
   164→
   165→### Git Integration
   166→- Branch detection and versioning
   167→- Repository-specific configurations
   168→- Push automation and notifications
   169→
   170→### External Services
   171→- SCMP for deployment orchestration
   172→- Feishu for team notifications
   173→- Excel for configuration data
   174→
   175→### Local Environment
   176→- PATH integration for global access
   177→- Token file management
   178→- Local anchor system
   179→
   180→## Scaling Considerations
   181→
   182→### Horizontal Scaling
   183→- Independent component execution
   184→- Parallel operation possible
   185→- Distributed anchor system
   186→
   187→### Vertical Scaling
   188→- Large Excel files handled efficiently
   189→- Multiple simultaneous deployments possible
   190→- Concurrent git operations supported
   191→
   192→### Maintenance Scaling
   193→- Clear separation of concerns
   194→- Independent upgrade paths
   195→- Isolated failure domains
   196→
   197→## Security Architecture
   198→
   199→### Authentication Layer
   200→- Token-based with refresh mechanisms
   201→- Environment-driven configuration
   202→- Secure storage with restricted permissions
   203→
   204→### Data Protection
   205→- No plaintext passwords
   206→- Encrypted communication
   207→- Secure credential handling
   208→
   209→### Access Control
   210→- Principle of least privilege
   211→- Component-level isolation
   212→- Environment-based configuration
   213→
   214→## Operational Patterns
   215→
   216→### Configuration Management
   217→- Excel-to-JSON transformation
   218→- Version-controlled configurations
   219→- Backup and recovery procedures
   220→
   221→### Deployment Automation
   222→- Continuous integration-ready
   223→- Automated parameter inference
   224→- Intelligent rollback capabilities
   225→
   226→### Monitoring and Observability
   227→- Structured logging
   228→- Notification systems
   229→- Status tracking and reporting
   230→
   231→This architecture enables rapid development and deployment while maintaining security, scalability, and maintainability.

SCIP 索引解析器已实现完成。

**实现概要：**

1. **`types.ts`** (251行) - 定义了完整的 SCIP 类型系统：
   - 枚举：`SymbolRole`, `SymbolKind`, `SyntaxKind`, `Language`, `TextEncoding`, `DescriptorSuffix`
   - 核心接口：`Index`, `Document`, `SymbolInformation`, `Occurrence`, `Relationship`, `Metadata`
   - 辅助类型：`Position`, `Range`, `ParsedSymbol`, `Package`, `Descriptor`
   - 提取类型：`ExtractedSymbol`, `ExtractedRelationship`, `ParseResult`

2. **`parser.ts`** (725行) - 实现了 protobuf 解析器：
   - `parseIndex(buffer)` - 解析 SCIP protobuf 二进制数据
   - `parseSymbol(symbol)` - 解析符号字符串为结构化对象
   - `getOccurrencesForSymbol()`, `getDefinitions()`, `getReferences()` - 查询辅助函数
   - 完整的 wire format 解析支持 varint、zigzag 编码

**满足 Acceptance Criteria：**
- ✅ 能解析 SCIP protobuf 格式（实现了 wire format 解析器）
- ✅ 提取 symbol 信息（`ExtractedSymbol` 包含 symbol、kind、displayName、documentation、position）
- ✅ 提取 position 信息（`Position` 包含 line 和 character）
- ✅ 提取 relationship 信息（`ExtractedRelationship` 包含 source、target 和 type）

    49→
    50→## Component Relationships
    51→
    52→### 1. Domain Tool Core ←→ SCMP Deploy Tools
    53→
    54→The Domain Tool Core and SCMP Deploy Tools work closely together:
    55→
    56→- **Domain Tool Core** generates configuration files that may be deployed using SCMP
    57→- **SCMP Deploy Tools** consume the configuration artifacts produced by Domain Tool Core
    58→- Both use the global anchor system for coordination
    59→- Share common workflow patterns (configuration → validation → deployment)
    60→
    61→### 2. bin/ Scripts ←→ All Components
    62→
    63→The global scripts provide unified access to all components:
    64→
    65→- **deploy** integrates with SCMP Deploy Tools and respects Domain Tool Core outputs
    66→- **push** coordinates git operations across all components
    67→- **lookup** provides unified search across all domain configurations
    68→
    69→### 3. Backup/Skills ←→ Core Components
    70→
    71→Provides safety and extensibility layers:
    72→
    73→- **Backup** preserves configuration states from Domain Tool Core
    74→- **Skills** extend functionality of all core components
    75→- **Templates** provide reusable patterns across the system
    76→
    77→## Data Flow
    78→
    79→### Configuration Generation Workflow
    80→
    81→```
    82→Excel Spreadsheet → Domain Tool Core → JSON Config → SCMP Deploy → Live Service
    83→     │                   │                  │              │            │
    84→     │                   │                  │              │            │
    85→     └───────────────────┤                  │              │            │
    86→                         │                  │              │            │
    87→                         └──────────────────┤              │            │
    88→                                            │              │            │
    89→                                            └──────────────┤            │
    90→                                                           │            │
    91→                                                           └────────────┘
    92→```
    93→
    94→### Deployment Workflow
    95→
    96→```
    97→Git Repo → push Script → Version Bump → Commit → Push → deploy Script → SCMP → Live Service
    98→    │          │            │            │        │         │            │
    99→    │          │            │            │        │         │            │
   100→    └──────────┼────────────┼────────────┼────────┼─────────┼────────────┘
   101→               │            │            │        │         │
   102→               └────────────┼────────────┼────────┼─────────┘
   103→                            │            │        │
   104→                            └────────────┼────────┘
   105→                                         │
   106→                                         └─────────┘
   107→```
   108→
   109→## Architecture Principles
   110→
   111→### 1. Decentralized Access
   112→
   113→- Components can operate independently
   114→- Global anchor system enables coordination without tight coupling
   115→- Scripts provide unified interfaces to decentralized functionality
   116→
   117→### 2. Security First
   118→
   119→- Credentials never stored in plain text
   120→- Tokens managed with proper permissions
   121→- Secure authentication flows
   122→- Minimal data exposure
   123→
   124→### 3. Convention Over Configuration
   125→
   126→- Standard file names (`.deploy-service`, etc.)
   127→- Consistent directory structures
   128→- Predictable behavior based on conventions
   129→- Intelligent defaults based on context
   130→
   131→### 4. Extensibility
   132→
   133→- Hook system for custom behaviors
   134→- Template system for flexible configurations
   135→- Skills system for extended functionality
   136→- Modular architecture enables additions
   137→
   138→## Technical Patterns
   139→
   140→### Global Anchor Pattern
   141→
   142→```
   143→Component A → Reads ~/.domain-tool-core-anchor → Resolves Core Path → Uses Core Functionality
   144→Component B → Reads ~/.domain-tool-core-anchor → Resolves Core Path → Uses Core Functionality
   145→```
   146→
   147→This allows moving the core directory without breaking dependent components.
   148→
   149→### Convention-Based Configuration
   150→
   151→Components use file system conventions to determine behavior:
   152→- `.deploy-service` in git repo → determines deployment target
   153→- Excel column names → map to configuration keys
   154→- Branch names → influence version strategies
   155→
   156→### Progressive Enhancement
   157→
   158→Scripts enhance basic functionality:
   159→- Basic git push → enhanced with versioning, notifications, hooks
   160→- Basic SCMP access → enhanced with authentication, parameter inference
   161→- Basic lookups → enhanced with domain intelligence
   162→
   163→## Integration Points
   164→
   165→### Git Integration
   166→- Branch detection and versioning
   167→- Repository-specific configurations
   168→- Push automation and notifications
   169→
   170→### External Services
   171→- SCMP for deployment orchestration
   172→- Feishu for team notifications
   173→- Excel for configuration data
   174→
   175→### Local Environment
   176→- PATH integration for global access
   177→- Token file management
   178→- Local anchor system
   179→
   180→## Scaling Considerations
   181→
   182→### Horizontal Scaling
   183→- Independent component execution
   184→- Parallel operation possible
   185→- Distributed anchor system
   186→
   187→### Vertical Scaling
   188→- Large Excel files handled efficiently
   189→- Multiple simultaneous deployments possible
   190→- Concurrent git operations supported
   191→
   192→### Maintenance Scaling
   193→- Clear separation of concerns
   194→- Independent upgrade paths
   195→- Isolated failure domains
   196→
   197→## Security Architecture
   198→
   199→### Authentication Layer
   200→- Token-based with refresh mechanisms
   201→- Environment-driven configuration
   202→- Secure storage with restricted permissions
   203→
   204→### Data Protection
   205→- No plaintext passwords
   206→- Encrypted communication
   207→- Secure credential handling
   208→
   209→### Access Control
   210→- Principle of least privilege
   211→- Component-level isolation
   212→- Environment-based configuration
   213→
   214→## Operational Patterns
   215→
   216→### Configuration Management
   217→- Excel-to-JSON transformation
   218→- Version-controlled configurations
   219→- Backup and recovery procedures
   220→
   221→### Deployment Automation
   222→- Continuous integration-ready
   223→- Automated parameter inference
   224→- Intelligent rollback capabilities
   225→
   226→### Monitoring and Observability
   227→- Structured logging
   228→- Notification systems
   229→- Status tracking and reporting
   230→
   231→This architecture enables rapid development and deployment while maintaining security, scalability, and maintainability.

{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"call_b42a4c76a76b40f0bb4094bf","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→#!/usr/bin/env bash
     2→
     3→set -euo pipefail
     4→
     5→echo "==================================="
     6→echo "Claude Code Multi-Provider Launcher"
     7→echo "==================================="
     8→echo ""
     9→echo "Please select a provider:"
    10→echo "1. MiniMax - MiniMax-M2.5"
    11→echo "2. Alibaba Bailian Coding Plan - qwen3-coder-plus"
    12→echo "3. Kimi Moonshot CN - kimi-k2.5"
    13→echo "4. Exit"
    14→echo ""
    15→echo "Note: Each terminal window has isolated env vars."
    16→echo "Open multiple windows to use different providers simultaneously."
    17→echo ""
    18→
    19→read -p "Enter number 1-4: " choice
    20→
    21→create_claude_json() {
    22→    local provider=$1
    23→    local opus=$2
    24→    local sonnet=$3
    25→    local haiku=$4
    26→    local json_path="$HOME/.claude.json"
    27→
    28→    echo "Creating .claude.json in user directory..."
    29→    cat > "$json_path" << EOF
    30→{
    31→  "provider": "$provider",
    32→  "api_key": "sk-sp-123",
    33→  "models": {
    34→    "opus": "$opus",
    35→    "sonnet": "$sonnet",
    36→    "haiku": "$haiku"
    37→  },
    38→  "agent_teams": {
    39→    "enabled": true,
    40→    "max_concurrent": 5
    41→  },
    42→  "note": "Replace sk-sp-123 with your real API key. Agent Teams enabled for parallel subagents.",
    43→  "configured_at": "$(date)"
    44→}
    45→EOF
    46→    echo "Config saved to $json_path"
    47→    echo "Agent Teams enabled - Claude can now spawn parallel subagents"
    48→    echo ""
    49→}
    50→
    51→case "${choice}" in
    52→    1)
    53→        echo "Configuring MiniMax M2.5 with Agent Teams..."
    54→        export ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL="https://api.minimaxi.com/anthropic"
    55→        export ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN="sk-cp-IliHozU0eZMHGU8pwwkWhBJBDDB20C_LqUBO9lISA-_AkT7lOuaXmqT_6zJLu58wWq2zx09Uic_sPJ_Q4B2fyMRbRii2PyeIEWtt5N8sp_eupfvnvLy_qeQ"
    56→        export ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_OPUS_MODEL="MiniMax-M2.5"
    57→        export ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_SONNET_MODEL="MiniMax-M2.5"
    58→        export ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_HAIKU_MODEL="MiniMax-M2.5"
    59→        export CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL="MiniMax-M2.5"
    60→        export CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_SUBAGENT_PARALLELISM="1"
    61→        export CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_CONCURRENT_SUBAGENTS="5"
    62→        export CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC="1"
    63→        export API_TIMEOUT_MS="3000000"
    64→        create_claude_json "minimax" "MiniMax-M2.5" "MiniMax-M2.5" "MiniMax-M2.5"
    65→        ;;
    66→    2)
    67→        echo "Configuring Alibaba Bailian Coding Plan with Agent Teams..."
    68→        export ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL="https://coding.dashscope.aliyuncs.com/apps/anthropic"
    69→        export ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN="sk-sp-e688954f817f4fa3b15968a5230f28ff"
    70→        export ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_OPUS_MODEL="qwen3-coder-plus"
    71→        export ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_SONNET_MODEL="qwen3-coder-plus"
    72→        export ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_HAIKU_MODEL="qwen3-coder-next"
    73→        export CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL="qwen3-coder-plus"
    74→        export CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_SUBAGENT_PARALLELISM="1"
    75→        export CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_CONCURRENT_SUBAGENTS="5"
    76→        export CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC="1"
    77→        export API_TIMEOUT_MS="3000000"
    78→        create_claude_json "bailian-coding" "qwen3-coder-plus" "qwen3-coder-plus" "qwen3-coder-next"
    79→        ;;
    80→    3)
    81→        echo "Configuring Kimi Moonshot CN K2.5 with Agent Teams..."
    82→        export ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL="https://api.moonshot.cn/anthropic"
    83→        export ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN="sk-kimi-14cRYB7SCYHdEnJqjpighnvnPq8CfTWAtLqTq9PH00s9d6Sk5lHpC2K1udAWqcRd"
    84→        export ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_OPUS_MODEL="kimi-k2.5"
    85→        export ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_SONNET_MODEL="kimi-k2.5"
    86→        export ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_HAIKU_MODEL="kimi-k2.5"
    87→        export CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL="kimi-k2.5"
    88→        export CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_SUBAGENT_PARALLELISM="1"
    89→        export CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_CONCURRENT_SUBAGENTS="10"
    90→        export CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC="1"
    91→        export API_TIMEOUT_MS="3000000"
    92→        create_claude_json "kimi-cn" "kimi-k2.5" "kimi-k2.5" "kimi-k2.5"
    93→        ;;
    94→    4)
    95→        echo "Exiting..."
    96→        exit 0
    97→        ;;
    98→    *)
    99→        echo "Invalid choice, please run script again."
   100→        exit 1
   101→        ;;
   102→esac
   103→
   104→echo ""
   105→echo "==================================="
   106→echo "Starting Claude Code with Agent Teams..."
   107→echo "Provider: $ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL"
   108→echo "Sonnet: $ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_SONNET_MODEL"
   109→echo "Subagent Model: $CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL"
   110→echo "Max Concurrent Agents: $CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_CONCURRENT_SUBAGENTS"
   111→echo "==================================="
   112→echo ""
   113→
   114→if ! command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   115→  echo "Error: claude command not found in PATH."
   116→  exit 1
   117→fi
   118→
   119→echo "Starting Claude Code..."
   120→
   121→
   122→claude

{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"call_b8288cb13035435aa5961505","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→#!/usr/bin/env bash
     2→set -euo pipefail
     3→
     4→# Run SCMP deploy from anywhere.
     5→
     6→SCMP_CLI_PATH_DEFAULT="/Users/xin/auto-skills/scmp-deploy/scripts/scmp_cli.py"
     7→SCMP_CLI_PATH="${SCMP_CLI_PATH:-$SCMP_CLI_PATH_DEFAULT}"
     8→
     9→if [[ ! -f "$SCMP_CLI_PATH" ]]; then
    10→  echo "Error: Script not found at $SCMP_CLI_PATH"
    11→  exit 1
    12→fi
    13→
    14→# Try to infer default service from current git repo.
    15→# Prefer .deploy-service; keep .deploy-name for backward compatibility.
    16→default_service=""
    17→repo_root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || true)
    18→if [[ -n "$repo_root" ]]; then
    19→  if [[ -f "$repo_root/.deploy-service" ]]; then
    20→    default_service=$(head -n 1 "$repo_root/.deploy-service" | tr -d '\r')
    21→  elif [[ -f "$repo_root/.deploy-name" ]]; then
    22→    default_service=$(head -n 1 "$repo_root/.deploy-name" | tr -d '\r')
    23→  fi
    24→  default_service="${default_service#"${default_service%%[![:space:]]*}"}"
    25→  default_service="${default_service%"${default_service##*[![:space:]]}"}"
    26→fi
    27→
    28→if [[ $# -eq 0 ]]; then
    29→  if [[ -n "$default_service" ]]; then
    30→    echo "使用仓库默认服务名: $default_service"
    31→    exec python3 "$SCMP_CLI_PATH" deploy "$default_service"
    32→  fi
    33→
    34→  if [[ -t 0 && -t 1 ]]; then
    35→    read -r -p "请输入要部署的服务名: " service_name
    36→    service_name="${service_name#"${service_name%%[![:space:]]*}"}"
    37→    service_name="${service_name%"${service_name##*[![:space:]]}"}"
    38→
    39→    if [[ -z "$service_name" ]]; then
    40→      echo "Error: 服务名不能为空"
    41→      exit 2
    42→    fi
    43→
    44→    exec python3 "$SCMP_CLI_PATH" deploy "$service_name"
    45→  fi
    46→
    47→  echo "Usage: deploy <server-name>"
    48→  echo
    49→  echo "示例:"
    50→  echo "  deploy ptc-301-gb"
    51→  echo "  deploy                # 在 git 仓库中优先读取 .deploy-service / .deploy-name"
    52→  echo
    53→  echo "首次使用需要先登录(保存 token，不会保存密码):"
    54→  echo "  export SCMP_SHARE_ID='<share_id>'"
    55→  echo "  python3 /Users/xin/auto-skills/scmp-deploy/scripts/scmp_cli.py login --prompt-password"
    56→  echo "  # 如需明文输入密码(可见/有回显): 追加 --plain-password 或设置 SCMP_PLAIN_PASSWORD=1"
    57→  exit 2
    58→fi
    59→
    60→# If options are passed first (e.g. deploy --branch xxx), use repo default service.
    61→if [[ "${1:-}" == -* ]]; then
    62→  if [[ -n "$default_service" ]]; then
    63→    echo "未显式传服务名，使用仓库默认服务名: $default_service"
    64→    exec python3 "$SCMP_CLI_PATH" deploy "$default_service" "$@"
    65→  fi
    66→fi
    67→
    68→exec python3 "$SCMP_CLI_PATH" deploy "$@"
    69→

{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"call_195582789b7d4c208d720466","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→#!/usr/bin/env bash
     2→set -euo pipefail
     3→
     4→# Global git push helper. Run inside a git repo.
     5→
     6→usage() {
     7→  cat <<'USAGE'
     8→Usage: push [-m "commit message"] [--feature <name>] [--ab <name>] [--no-marker] [--dry-run] [--no-notify]
     9→
    10→Environment:
    11→  FEISHU_WEBHOOK      Feishu bot webhook URL. If set, can send notify.
    12→  PUSH_NOTIFY         If set to 1, auto-send notify without prompt.
    13→  PUSH_LOCAL_HOOK     Path to local hook script (relative or absolute).
    14→  PUSH_POST_HOOK      Path to post-push hook script (relative or absolute).
    15→  PUSH_SKIP_BUMP      If set to 1, skip version bump prompt.
    16→  PUSH_FEATURE        Marker value for feature (lower priority than CLI args).
    17→  PUSH_AB             Marker value for ab (lower priority than CLI args).
    18→  PUSH_MARKER_MODE    Marker mode: none|feature|ab.
    19→  PUSH_NON_INTERACTIVE If set to 1, skip interactive marker prompt.
    20→
    21→Local pre-hook search order (first match):
    22→  1) $PUSH_LOCAL_HOOK
    23→  2) ./.push.local.sh
    24→  3) ./scripts/push.local.sh
    25→
    26→Local post-hook search order (first match):
    27→  1) $PUSH_POST_HOOK
    28→  2) ./.push.post.sh
    29→  3) ./scripts/push.post.sh
    30→USAGE
    31→}
    32→
    33→trim() {
    34→  local v="$1"
    35→  v="${v#"${v%%[![:space:]]*}"}"
    36→  v="${v%"${v##*[![:space:]]}"}"
    37→  printf '%s' "$v"
    38→}
    39→
    40→json_escape() {
    41→  local s="$1"
    42→  s=${s//\\/\\\\}
    43→  s=${s//"/\\"}
    44→  s=${s//$'\n'/\\n}
    45→  s=${s//$'\r'/\\r}
    46→  s=${s//$'\t'/\\t}
    47→  printf '%s' "$s"
    48→}
    49→
    50→load_marker_options() {
    51→  local options_file="$1"
    52→  local marker_type="$2"
    53→
    54→  if [[ ! -f "$options_file" ]]; then
    55→    return 0
    56→  fi
    57→
    58→  if ! command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    59→    return 0
    60→  fi
    61→
    62→  node -e '
    63→const fs = require("fs");
    64→const file = process.argv[1];
    65→const key = process.argv[2];
    66→try {
    67→  const raw = fs.readFileSync(file, "utf8");
    68→  const json = JSON.parse(raw);
    69→  const arr = Array.isArray(json[key]) ? json[key] : [];
    70→  for (const item of arr) {
    71→    if (typeof item === "string" && item.trim()) {
    72→      console.log(item.trim());
    73→    }
    74→  }
    75→} catch (_) {}
    76→' "$options_file" "$marker_type"
    77→}
    78→
    79→prompt_marker_value() {
    80→  local marker_type="$1"
    81→  local options_file="$2"
    82→  local value=""
    83→  local opts=()
    84→  local line=""
    85→
    86→  while IFS= read -r line; do
    87→    opts+=("$line")
    88→  done < <(load_marker_options "$options_file" "$marker_type")
    89→
    90→  if [[ ${#opts[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then
    91→    echo "请选择 ${marker_type}：" >&2
    92→    echo "0. 手动输入" >&2
    93→    local i=1
    94→    for item in "${opts[@]}"; do
    95→      echo "${i}. ${item}" >&2
    96→      i=$((i + 1))
    97→    done
    98→
    99→    read -r -p "请输入 ${marker_type} 选项序号（或直接输入名称，回车=手动输入）: " marker_choice
   100→    marker_choice=$(trim "${marker_choice:-}")
   101→
   102→    if [[ "$marker_choice" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]] && [[ "$marker_choice" -ge 1 ]] && [[ "$marker_choice" -le ${#opts[@]} ]]; then
   103→      value="${opts[$((marker_choice - 1))]}"
   104→      echo "$value"
   105→      return 0
   106→    fi
   107→
   108→    if [[ -n "$marker_choice" && ! "$marker_choice" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
   109→      value="$marker_choice"
   110→      echo "$value"
   111→      return 0
   112→    fi
   113→  fi
   114→
   115→  read -r -p "请输入 ${marker_type} 名称(直接回车取消): " value
   116→  value=$(trim "$value")
   117→  echo "$value"
   118→}
   119→
   120→commit_message=""
   121→notify_flag="auto"
   122→cli_feature=""
   123→cli_ab=""
   124→cli_no_marker=0
   125→dry_run=0
   126→
   127→while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
   128→  case "$1" in
   129→    -m|--message)
   130→      commit_message="${2:-}"
   131→      shift 2
   132→      ;;
   133→    --feature)
   134→      cli_feature="${2:-}"
   135→      shift 2
   136→      ;;
   137→    --ab)
   138→      cli_ab="${2:-}"
   139→      shift 2
   140→      ;;
   141→    --no-marker)
   142→      cli_no_marker=1
   143→      shift
   144→      ;;
   145→    --dry-run)
   146→      dry_run=1
   147→      shift
   148→      ;;
   149→    --no-notify)
   150→      notify_flag="no"
   151→      shift
   152→      ;;
   153→    -h|--help)
   154→      usage
   155→      exit 0
   156→      ;;
   157→    *)
   158→      echo "Unknown arg: $1"
   159→      usage
   160→      exit 2
   161→      ;;
   162→  esac
   163→done
   164→
   165→if [[ -n "$cli_feature" && -n "$cli_ab" ]]; then
   166→  echo "--feature 和 --ab 不能同时使用"
   167→  exit 2
   168→fi
   169→
   170→if [[ "$cli_no_marker" == "1" ]] && ([[ -n "$cli_feature" ]] || [[ -n "$cli_ab" ]]); then
   171→  echo "--no-marker 不能与 --feature/--ab 同时使用"
   172→  exit 2
   173→fi
   174→
   175→repo_root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || true)
   176→if [[ -z "${repo_root}" ]]; then
   177→  echo "当前目录不是 git 仓库"
   178→  exit 1
   179→fi
   180→
   181→cd "$repo_root"
   182→
   183→marker_mode=""
   184→marker_value=""
   185→
   186→# Priority: CLI > ENV > Interactive > none
   187→if [[ "$cli_no_marker" == "1" ]]; then
   188→  marker_mode="none"
   189→elif [[ -n "$cli_feature" ]]; then
   190→  marker_mode="feature"
   191→  marker_value="$(trim "$cli_feature")"
   192→elif [[ -n "$cli_ab" ]]; then
   193→  marker_mode="ab"
   194→  marker_value="$(trim "$cli_ab")"
   195→else
   196→  env_marker_mode="$(trim "${PUSH_MARKER_MODE:-}")"
   197→  env_feature="$(trim "${PUSH_FEATURE:-}")"
   198→  env_ab="$(trim "${PUSH_AB:-}")"
   199→
   200→  if [[ "$env_marker_mode" == "none" ]]; then
   201→    marker_mode="none"
   202→  elif [[ "$env_marker_mode" == "feature" ]]; then
   203→    marker_mode="feature"
   204→    marker_value="$env_feature"
   205→  elif [[ "$env_marker_mode" == "ab" ]]; then
   206→    marker_mode="ab"
   207→    marker_value="$env_ab"
   208→  elif [[ -n "$env_feature" ]]; then
   209→    marker_mode="feature"
   210→    marker_value="$env_feature"
   211→  elif [[ -n "$env_ab" ]]; then
   212→    marker_mode="ab"
   213→    marker_value="$env_ab"
   214→  fi
   215→
   216→  if [[ -z "$marker_mode" ]] && [[ "${PUSH_NON_INTERACTIVE:-0}" != "1" ]]; then
   217→    echo "请选择发布标记："
   218→    echo "0. 不加标记（默认）"
   219→    echo "1. feature"
   220→    echo "2. ab"
   221→    read -r -p "请输入标记类型序号(默认0): " marker_choice
   222→    marker_choice=${marker_choice:-0}
   223→
   224→    options_file="$repo_root/scripts/push.options.json"
   225→    if [[ "$marker_choice" == "1" ]]; then
   226→      marker_mode="feature"
   227→      marker_value="$(prompt_marker_value "feature" "$options_file")"
   228→      if [[ -z "$marker_value" ]]; then
   229→        marker_mode="none"
   230→      fi
   231→    elif [[ "$marker_choice" == "2" ]]; then
   232→      marker_mode="ab"
   233→      marker_value="$(prompt_marker_value "ab" "$options_file")"
   234→      if [[ -z "$marker_value" ]]; then
   235→        marker_mode="none"
   236→      fi
   237→    else
   238→      marker_mode="none"
   239→    fi
   240→  fi
   241→fi
   242→
   243→if [[ -z "$marker_mode" ]]; then
   244→  marker_mode="none"
   245→fi
   246→
   247→if [[ "$marker_mode" != "none" && -z "$marker_value" ]]; then
   248→  if [[ "${PUSH_NON_INTERACTIVE:-0}" == "1" ]]; then
   249→    echo "非交互模式下，${marker_mode} 不能为空"
   250→    exit 2
   251→  fi
   252→  read -r -p "请输入 ${marker_mode} 名称(直接回车取消): " marker_value
   253→  marker_value="$(trim "$marker_value")"
   254→  if [[ -z "$marker_value" ]]; then
   255→    marker_mode="none"
   256→  fi
   257→fi
   258→
   259→if [[ "$marker_mode" == "feature" ]]; then
   260→  export PUSH_MARKER_MODE="feature"
   261→  export PUSH_FEATURE="$marker_value"
   262→  unset PUSH_AB
   263→elif [[ "$marker_mode" == "ab" ]]; then
   264→  export PUSH_MARKER_MODE="ab"
   265→  export PUSH_AB="$marker_value"
   266→  unset PUSH_FEATURE
   267→else
   268→  export PUSH_MARKER_MODE="none"
   269→  unset PUSH_FEATURE PUSH_AB
   270→fi
   271→
   272→# --- 部署名称/服务名处理 ---
   273→# .deploy-service: 用于 deploy 默认服务名（推荐）
   274→# .deploy-name: 兼容历史用法（审批文案等）
   275→# .deploy-path: 用于 deploy 默认 path（可为空）
   276→deploy_service_file=".deploy-service"
   277→deploy_name_file=".deploy-name"
   278→deploy_path_file=".deploy-path"
   279→reconfigure_deploy=0
   280→
   281→# 历史兼容：旧版本会把部署配置写入 .gitignore，导致不同项目/分支共享本地配置。
   282→# 现在统一移除这些忽略项，并在本次 push 中重新询问配置。
   283→if [[ -f ".gitignore" ]]; then
   284→  gitignore_tmp=$(mktemp)
   285→  awk -v s="$deploy_service_file" -v n="$deploy_name_file" -v p="$deploy_path_file" '
   286→    $0 == s || $0 == n || $0 == p { next }
   287→    { print }
   288→  ' ".gitignore" > "$gitignore_tmp"
   289→
   290→  if ! cmp -s ".gitignore" "$gitignore_tmp"; then
   291→    mv "$gitignore_tmp" ".gitignore"
   292→    reconfigure_deploy=1
   293→    echo "已从 .gitignore 移除旧部署忽略项: $deploy_service_file, $deploy_name_file, $deploy_path_file"
   294→  else
   295→    rm -f "$gitignore_tmp"
   296→  fi
   297→fi
   298→
   299→if [[ "$reconfigure_deploy" == "1" ]]; then
   300→  current_deploy_name=""
   301→  if [[ -f "$deploy_service_file" ]]; then
   302→    current_deploy_name=$(cat "$deploy_service_file")
   303→  elif [[ -f "$deploy_name_file" ]]; then
   304→    current_deploy_name=$(cat "$deploy_name_file")
   305→  fi
   306→  echo "检测到历史忽略配置，为避免部署名称冲突，请重新确认。"
   307→  read -r -p "请输入项目部署名 (当前: ${current_deploy_name:-未配置}，直接回车保持不变): " input_name
   308→  if [[ -n "$input_name" ]]; then
   309→    echo "$input_name" > "$deploy_service_file"
   310→    echo "$input_name" > "$deploy_name_file"
   311→    deploy_name="$input_name"
   312→  else
   313→    deploy_name="${current_deploy_name:-$(basename "$repo_root")}"
   314→    echo "$deploy_name" > "$deploy_service_file"
   315→    echo "$deploy_name" > "$deploy_name_file"
   316→  fi
   317→elif [[ -f "$deploy_service_file" ]]; then
   318→  deploy_name=$(cat "$deploy_service_file")
   319→elif [[ -f "$deploy_name_file" ]]; then
   320→  deploy_name=$(cat "$deploy_name_file")
   321→else
   322→  echo "检测到尚未配置部署名称。"
   323→  read -r -p "请输入项目部署名 (可以lookup搜索域名对应的scmp项目名): " input_name
   324→  if [[ -n "$input_name" ]]; then
   325→    echo "$input_name" > "$deploy_service_file"
   326→    echo "$input_name" > "$deploy_name_file"
   327→    deploy_name="$input_name"
   328→  else
   329→    deploy_name=$(basename "$repo_root")
   330→  fi
   331→fi
   332→
   333→# 若读取到的是旧文件，自动补写新文件，便于 deploy 默认读取。
   334→if [[ -n "${deploy_name:-}" && ! -f "$deploy_service_file" ]]; then
   335→  echo "$deploy_name" > "$deploy_service_file"
   336→fi
   337→
   338→# path 首次录入（含历史项目补录）：
   339→# 仅在 .deploy-path 文件不存在时触发；可输入空值，但必须走一次输入步骤。
   340→if [[ "$reconfigure_deploy" == "1" || ! -f "$deploy_path_file" ]]; then
   341→  echo "请确认本项目是否需要执行上传命令。"
   342→  current_deploy_path=""
   343→  if [[ -f "$deploy_path_file" ]]; then
   344→    current_deploy_path=$(cat "$deploy_path_file")
   345→  fi
   346→  read -r -p "请输入部署 path (可留空；当前: ${current_deploy_path}，直接回车保持不变): " input_path
   347→  echo "${input_path}" > "$deploy_path_file"
   348→fi
   349→
   350→deploy_path=""
   351→if [[ -f "$deploy_path_file" ]]; then
   352→  deploy_path=$(cat "$deploy_path_file")
   353→fi
   354→
   355→project_name=$(basename "$repo_root")
   356→current_branch=$(git symbolic-ref --short HEAD)
   357→
   358→# ----- version increment (generic) -----
   359→increment_version() {
   360→  local branch=$1
   361→  local format_type=$2
   362→
   363→  local pattern_standard="([0-9]+\\.[0-9]+)\\.([0-9]+)"
   364→  local pattern_extended="([0-9]+\\.[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+)\\.([0-9]+)"
   365→  local pattern_three_parts="([0-9]+\\.[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+)$"
   366→  local pattern_two_parts="([0-9]+\\.[0-9]+)$"
   367→
   368→  if [[ $format_type == "extended" && $branch =~ $pattern_extended ]]; then
   369→    local main_version="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
   370→    local sub_version="${BASH_REMATCH[2]}"
   371→    local new_sub_version=$((sub_version + 1))
   372→    echo "${main_version}.${new_sub_version}"
   373→  elif [[ $format_type == "auto" && $branch =~ $pattern_extended ]]; then
   374→    local main_version="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
   375→    local sub_version="${BASH_REMATCH[2]}"
   376→    local new_sub_version=$((sub_version + 1))
   377→    echo "${main_version}.${new_sub_version}"
   378→  elif [[ $format_type == "extended" && $branch =~ $pattern_three_parts ]]; then
   379→    echo "${branch}.1"
   380→  elif [[ $format_type != "extended" && $branch =~ $pattern_standard ]]; then
   381→    local main_version="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
   382→    local sub_version="${BASH_REMATCH[2]}"
   383→    local new_sub_version=$((sub_version + 1))
   384→    echo "${main_version}.${new_sub_version}"
   385→  elif [[ $format_type == "extended" && $branch =~ $pattern_two_parts ]]; then
   386→    echo "${branch}.0.1"
   387→  elif [[ $branch =~ $pattern_two_parts ]]; then
   388→    echo "${branch}.1"
   389→  else
   390→    echo "${branch}"
   391→  fi
   392→}
   393→
   394→old_branch="$current_branch"
   395→project_prefix=""
   396→version_part=""
   397→
   398→if [[ $current_branch =~ ^(.+)-([0-9]+\.[0-9]+.*)$ ]]; then
   399→  project_prefix="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
   400→  version_part="${BASH_REMATCH[2]}"
   401→else
   402→  version_part="$current_branch"
   403→fi
   404→
   405→if [[ "${PUSH_SKIP_BUMP:-0}" != "1" && $current_branch =~ [0-9]+\.[0-9]+ ]]; then
   406→  echo "当前分支: $current_branch"
   407→  echo "请选择版本号格式:"
   408→  echo "1. 标准格式 (x.x.y)"
   409→  echo "2. 扩展格式 (x.x.x.y) [默认]"
   410→  read -r -p "请选择版本号格式(1/2): " version_format_choice
   411→
   412→  version_format_choice=${version_format_choice:-2}
   413→  if [[ "$version_format_choice" == "1" ]]; then
   414→    version_format="standard"
   415→  else
   416→    version_format="extended"
   417→  fi
   418→
   419→  new_version_part=$(increment_version "$version_part" "$version_format")
   420→  if [[ -n "$project_prefix" ]]; then
   421→    new_branch_name="${project_prefix}-${new_version_part}"
   422→  else
   423→    new_branch_name="$new_version_part"
   424→  fi
   425→
   426→  echo "建议新分支: $new_branch_name"
   427→  read -r -p "是否使用新版本号(1/2)[默认1]: " use_new_version
   428→  use_new_version=${use_new_version:-1}
   429→  if [[ "$use_new_version" == "1" ]]; then
   430→    if [[ "$dry_run" == "1" ]]; then
   431→      echo "[dry-run] 将创建并切换到新分支: $new_branch_name"
   432→      current_branch="$new_branch_name"
   433→    else
   434→      git checkout -b "$new_branch_name"
   435→      current_branch="$new_branch_name"
   436→    fi
   437→  fi
   438→fi
   439→
   440→# Build hook paths first (for dry-run preview)
   441→pre_hook_path=""
   442→if [[ -n "${PUSH_LOCAL_HOOK:-}" ]]; then
   443→  pre_hook_path="$PUSH_LOCAL_HOOK"
   444→elif [[ -f ".push.local.sh" ]]; then
   445→  pre_hook_path=".push.local.sh"
   446→elif [[ -f "scripts/push.local.sh" ]]; then
   447→  pre_hook_path="scripts/push.local.sh"
   448→fi
   449→if [[ -n "$pre_hook_path" && "$pre_hook_path" != /* ]]; then
   450→  pre_hook_path="$repo_root/$pre_hook_path"
   451→fi
   452→
   453→post_hook_path=""
   454→if [[ -n "${PUSH_POST_HOOK:-}" ]]; then
   455→  post_hook_path="$PUSH_POST_HOOK"
   456→elif [[ -f ".push.post.sh" ]]; then
   457→  post_hook_path=".push.post.sh"
   458→elif [[ -f "scripts/push.post.sh" ]]; then
   459→  post_hook_path="scripts/push.post.sh"
   460→fi
   461→if [[ -n "$post_hook_path" && "$post_hook_path" != /* ]]; then
   462→  post_hook_path="$repo_root/$post_hook_path"
   463→fi
   464→
   465→marker_value_escaped="$(json_escape "$marker_value")"
   466→deploy_name_escaped="$(json_escape "${deploy_name:-}")"
   467→deploy_path_escaped="$(json_escape "${deploy_path:-}")"
   468→project_name_escaped="$(json_escape "$project_name")"
   469→branch_escaped="$(json_escape "$current_branch")"
   470→marker_mode_escaped="$(json_escape "$marker_mode")"
   471→
   472→export PUSH_CTX_JSON="{\"markerMode\":\"${marker_mode_escaped}\",\"markerValue\":\"${marker_value_escaped}\",\"feature\":\"$(json_escape "${PUSH_FEATURE:-}")\",\"ab\":\"$(json_escape "${PUSH_AB:-}")\",\"dryRun\":${dry_run},\"project\":\"${project_name_escaped}\",\"branch\":\"${branch_escaped}\",\"deployService\":\"${deploy_name_escaped}\",\"deployPath\":\"${deploy_path_escaped}\"}"
   473→
   474→if [[ "$dry_run" == "1" ]]; then
   475→  echo "[dry-run] 仓库: $repo_root"
   476→  echo "[dry-run] 分支: $current_branch"
   477→  echo "[dry-run] 标记模式: $marker_mode"
   478→  if [[ "$marker_mode" != "none" ]]; then
   479→    echo "[dry-run] 标记值: $marker_value"
   480→  fi
   481→  if [[ -n "$pre_hook_path" ]]; then
   482→    echo "[dry-run] 将执行 Pre Hook: $pre_hook_path"
   483→  else
   484→    echo "[dry-run] 未配置 Pre Hook"
   485→  fi
   486→  echo "[dry-run] 将执行: git add -A"
   487→  if [[ -n "$commit_message" ]]; then
   488→    echo "[dry-run] 将执行: git commit -m \"$commit_message\""
   489→  else
   490→    echo "[dry-run] 将在运行时询问提交信息"
   491→  fi
   492→  echo "[dry-run] 将执行: git push (或首次 push -u origin <branch>)"
   493→  if [[ "$notify_flag" != "no" ]]; then
   494→    echo "[dry-run] 通知策略: ${PUSH_NOTIFY:-0} (1=自动发送, 其他=交互确认)"
   495→  else
   496→    echo "[dry-run] 通知策略: 已禁用"
   497→  fi
   498→  if [[ -n "$post_hook_path" ]]; then
   499→    echo "[dry-run] 将执行 Post Hook: $post_hook_path"
   500→  else
   501→    echo "[dry-run] 未配置 Post Hook"
   502→  fi
   503→  exit 0
   504→fi
   505→
   506→# Local pre-hook (project specific changes)
   507→if [[ -n "$pre_hook_path" ]]; then
   508→  echo "执行本地 Pre Hook: $pre_hook_path"
   509→  if [[ -x "$pre_hook_path" ]]; then
   510→    "$pre_hook_path" "$repo_root" "$current_branch" "$project_name" "$old_branch"
   511→  else
   512→    bash "$pre_hook_path" "$repo_root" "$current_branch" "$project_name" "$old_branch"
   513→  fi
   514→fi
   515→
   516→# Stage all changes
   517→if ! git diff --quiet || ! git diff --cached --quiet; then
   518→  git add -A
   519→fi
   520→
   521→# Commit if there are staged changes
   522→if git diff --cached --quiet; then
   523→  echo "没有可提交的变更"
   524→else
   525→  if [[ -z "$commit_message" ]]; then
   526→    read -r -p "请输入提交信息: " commit_message
   527→  fi
   528→  if [[ -z "$commit_message" ]]; then
   529→    echo "提交信息不能为空"
   530→    exit 1
   531→  fi
   532→  git commit -m "$commit_message"
   533→fi
   534→
   535→# Push
   536→if git rev-parse --abbrev-ref --symbolic-full-name @{u} >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   537→  git push
   538→else
   539→  git push -u origin "$current_branch"
   540→fi
   541→
   542→# Collect changed files from last commit (if any)
   543→changed_files=""
   544→if git rev-parse HEAD~1 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   545→  changed_files=$(git diff --name-only HEAD~1 HEAD | tr '\n' ',' | sed 's/,$//')
   546→fi
   547→
   548→# Notify (Feishu)
   549→if [[ -n "${FEISHU_WEBHOOK:-}" && "$notify_flag" != "no" ]]; then
   550→  if [[ "${PUSH_NOTIFY:-0}" != "1" ]]; then
   551→    read -r -p "是否发送飞书通知? (y/N): " notify_choice
   552→    if [[ "${notify_choice}" != "y" && "${notify_choice}" != "Y" ]]; then
   553→      notify_choice=""
   554→    fi
   555→  else
   556→    notify_choice="y"
   557→  fi
   558→
   559→  if [[ -n "$notify_choice" ]]; then
   560→    notify_content="${commit_message:-已推送}"
   561→    marker_notify=""
   562→    if [[ "$marker_mode" == "feature" ]]; then
   563→      marker_notify="\\nFeature: ${marker_value}"
   564→    elif [[ "$marker_mode" == "ab" ]]; then
   565→      marker_notify="\\nAB: ${marker_value}"
   566→    fi
   567→    curl -sS -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
   568→      -d "{\"msg_type\": \"text\", \"content\": {\"text\": \"🚀 推送通知\\n项目: ${project_name}\\n分支: ${current_branch}${marker_notify}\\n提交信息: ${commit_message:-无}\\n更新文件: ${changed_files}\"}}" \
   569→      "$FEISHU_WEBHOOK" >/dev/null
   570→    echo "飞书通知已发送"
   571→  fi
   572→fi
   573→
   574→# Local post-hook (optional)
   575→if [[ -n "$post_hook_path" ]]; then
   576→  echo "执行本地 Post Hook: $post_hook_path"
   577→  if [[ -x "$post_hook_path" ]]; then
   578→    "$post_hook_path" "$repo_root" "$current_branch" "$project_name" "$old_branch"
   579→  else
   580→    bash "$post_hook_path" "$repo_root" "$current_branch" "$project_name" "$old_branch"
   581→  fi
   582→fi
   583→

{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"call_656235a0e2cd4e99b4df8ae1","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→#!/bin/bash
     2→# Figma MCP 服务管理工具
     3→
     4→MCP_SERVER_PATH="/Users/xin/ImagePrepMCP/figma-smart-image-mcp/dist/server.js"
     5→PORT=3845
     6→PID_FILE="$HOME/.figmamcp.pid"
     7→LOG_FILE="$HOME/figma-mcp.log"
     8→
     9→case "$1" in
    10→    start)
    11→        if [ -f "$PID_FILE" ]; then
    12→            PID=$(cat "$PID_FILE")
    13→            if kill -0 $PID 2>/dev/null; then
    14→                echo "Figma MCP服务已在运行 (PID: $PID)"
    15→                exit 0
    16→            else
    17→                rm "$PID_FILE"
    18→            fi
    19→        fi
    20→        
    21→        echo "正在启动Figma MCP服务..."
    22→        nohup node "$MCP_SERVER_PATH" --transport=http --port=$PORT > "$LOG_FILE" 2>&1 &
    23→        
    24→        PID=$!
    25→        echo $PID > "$PID_FILE"
    26→        
    27→        if kill -0 $PID 2>/dev/null; then
    28→            echo "Figma MCP服务已在后台启动，PID: $PID"
    29→            echo "服务地址: http://localhost:$PORT"
    30→        else
    31→            echo "启动失败"
    32→            rm "$PID_FILE"
    33→            exit 1
    34→        fi
    35→        ;;
    36→    stop)
    37→        if [ -f "$PID_FILE" ]; then
    38→            PID=$(cat "$PID_FILE")
    39→            if kill -0 $PID 2>/dev/null; then
    40→                kill $PID
    41→                rm "$PID_FILE"
    42→                echo "Figma MCP服务已停止 (PID: $PID)"
    43→            else
    44→                echo "进程未运行或已不存在"
    45→                rm "$PID_FILE"
    46→            fi
    47→        else
    48→            echo "服务未在运行"
    49→        fi
    50→        ;;
    51→    restart)
    52→        $0 stop
    53→        sleep 2
    54→        $0 start
    55→        ;;
    56→    status)
    57→        if [ -f "$PID_FILE" ]; then
    58→            PID=$(cat "$PID_FILE")
    59→            if kill -0 $PID 2>/dev/null; then
    60→                echo "Figma MCP服务正在运行 (PID: $PID)"
    61→                echo "服务地址: http://localhost:$PORT"
    62→            else
    63→                echo "PID文件存在但进程不在运行"
    64→                rm "$PID_FILE"
    65→            fi
    66→        else
    67→            echo "Figma MCP服务未运行"
    68→        fi
    69→        ;;
    70→    log)
    71→        if [ -f "$LOG_FILE" ]; then
    72→            tail -n 20 "$LOG_FILE"
    73→        else
    74→            echo "日志文件不存在"
    75→        fi
    76→        ;;
    77→    *)
    78→        echo "用法: $0 {start|stop|restart|status|log}"
    79→        echo "  start   - 启动Figma MCP服务"
    80→        echo "  stop    - 停止Figma MCP服务" 
    81→        echo "  restart - 重启Figma MCP服务"
    82→        echo "  status  - 查看服务状态"
    83→        echo "  log     - 查看最近的日志"
    84→        exit 1
    85→        ;;
    86→esac
    87→

**`src/cli/fg-index.ts`** — CLI entry point:
- Parses `--project` / `-p` flag (defaults to cwd)

**`src/indexer/builder.ts`** — Core indexing logic:

- `indexerCommand()` — maps to `scip-typescript index` or `scip-go index`
- `buildIndex()` — runs the indexer via `execFile`, parses `index.scip` JSON output, creates SQLite DB with `documents`/`symbols` tables, inserts all symbols in a transaction

    65→- **deploy** integrates with SCMP Deploy Tools and respects Domain Tool Core outputs
    66→- **push** coordinates git operations across all components
    67→- **lookup** provides unified search across all domain configurations
    68→
    69→### 3. Backup/Skills ←→ Core Components
    70→
    71→Provides safety and extensibility layers:
    72→
    73→- **Backup** preserves configuration states from Domain Tool Core
    74→- **Skills** extend functionality of all core components
    75→- **Templates** provide reusable patterns across the system
    76→
    77→## Data Flow
    78→
    79→### Configuration Generation Workflow
    80→
    81→```
    82→Excel Spreadsheet → Domain Tool Core → JSON Config → SCMP Deploy → Live Service
    83→     │                   │                  │              │            │
    84→     │                   │                  │              │            │
    85→     └───────────────────┤                  │              │            │
    86→                         │                  │              │            │
    87→                         └──────────────────┤              │            │
    88→                                            │              │            │
    89→                                            └──────────────┤            │
    90→                                                           │            │
    91→                                                           └────────────┘
    92→```
    93→
    94→### Deployment Workflow
    95→
    96→```
    97→Git Repo → push Script → Version Bump → Commit → Push → deploy Script → SCMP → Live Service
    98→    │          │            │            │        │         │            │
    99→    │          │            │            │        │         │            │
   100→    └──────────┼────────────┼────────────┼────────┼─────────┼────────────┘
   101→               │            │            │        │         │
   102→               └────────────┼────────────┼────────┼─────────┘
   103→                            │            │        │
   104→                            └────────────┼────────┘
   105→                                         │
   106→                                         └─────────┘
   107→```
   108→
   109→## Architecture Principles
   110→
   111→### 1. Decentralized Access
   112→
   113→- Components can operate independently
   114→- Global anchor system enables coordination without tight coupling
   115→- Scripts provide unified interfaces to decentralized functionality
   116→
   117→### 2. Security First
   118→
   119→- Credentials never stored in plain text
   120→- Tokens managed with proper permissions
   121→- Secure authentication flows
   122→- Minimal data exposure
   123→
   124→### 3. Convention Over Configuration
   125→
   126→- Standard file names (`.deploy-service`, etc.)
   127→- Consistent directory structures
   128→- Predictable behavior based on conventions
   129→- Intelligent defaults based on context
   130→
   131→### 4. Extensibility
   132→
   133→- Hook system for custom behaviors
   134→- Template system for flexible configurations
   135→- Skills system for extended functionality
   136→- Modular architecture enables additions
   137→
   138→## Technical Patterns
   139→
   140→### Global Anchor Pattern
   141→
   142→```
   143→Component A → Reads ~/.domain-tool-core-anchor → Resolves Core Path → Uses Core Functionality
   144→Component B → Reads ~/.domain-tool-core-anchor → Resolves Core Path → Uses Core Functionality
   145→```
   146→
   147→This allows moving the core directory without breaking dependent components.
   148→
   149→### Convention-Based Configuration
   150→
   151→Components use file system conventions to determine behavior:
   152→- `.deploy-service` in git repo → determines deployment target
   153→- Excel column names → map to configuration keys
   154→- Branch names → influence version strategies
   155→
   156→### Progressive Enhancement
   157→
   158→Scripts enhance basic functionality:
   159→- Basic git push → enhanced with versioning, notifications, hooks
   160→- Basic SCMP access → enhanced with authentication, parameter inference
   161→- Basic lookups → enhanced with domain intelligence
   162→
   163→## Integration Points
   164→
   165→### Git Integration
   166→- Branch detection and versioning
   167→- Repository-specific configurations
   168→- Push automation and notifications
   169→
   170→### External Services
   171→- SCMP for deployment orchestration
   172→- Feishu for team notifications
   173→- Excel for configuration data
   174→
   175→### Local Environment
   176→- PATH integration for global access
   177→- Token file management
   178→- Local anchor system
   179→
   180→## Scaling Considerations
   181→
   182→### Horizontal Scaling
   183→- Independent component execution
   184→- Parallel operation possible
   185→- Distributed anchor system
   186→
   187→### Vertical Scaling
   188→- Large Excel files handled efficiently
   189→- Multiple simultaneous deployments possible
   190→- Concurrent git operations supported
   191→
   192→### Maintenance Scaling
   193→- Clear separation of concerns
   194→- Independent upgrade paths
   195→- Isolated failure domains
   196→
   197→## Security Architecture
   198→
   199→### Authentication Layer
   200→- Token-based with refresh mechanisms
   201→- Environment-driven configuration
   202→- Secure storage with restricted permissions
   203→
   204→### Data Protection
   205→- No plaintext passwords
   206→- Encrypted communication
   207→- Secure credential handling
   208→
   209→### Access Control
   210→- Principle of least privilege
   211→- Component-level isolation
   212→- Environment-based configuration
   213→
   214→## Operational Patterns
   215→
   216→### Configuration Management
   217→- Excel-to-JSON transformation
   218→- Version-controlled configurations
   219→- Backup and recovery procedures
   220→
   221→### Deployment Automation
   222→- Continuous integration-ready
   223→- Automated parameter inference
   224→- Intelligent rollback capabilities
   225→
   226→### Monitoring and Observability
   227→- Structured logging
   228→- Notification systems
   229→- Status tracking and reporting
   230→
   231→This architecture enables rapid development and deployment while maintaining security, scalability, and maintainability.

     4→# Global git push helper. Run inside a git repo.
     5→
     6→usage() {
     7→  cat <<'USAGE'
     8→Usage: push [-m "commit message"] [--feature <name>] [--ab <name>] [--no-marker] [--dry-run] [--no-notify]
     9→
    10→Environment:
    11→  FEISHU_WEBHOOK      Feishu bot webhook URL. If set, can send notify.
    12→  PUSH_NOTIFY         If set to 1, auto-send notify without prompt.
    13→  PUSH_LOCAL_HOOK     Path to local hook script (relative or absolute).
    14→  PUSH_POST_HOOK      Path to post-push hook script (relative or absolute).
    15→  PUSH_SKIP_BUMP      If set to 1, skip version bump prompt.
    16→  PUSH_FEATURE        Marker value for feature (lower priority than CLI args).
    17→  PUSH_AB             Marker value for ab (lower priority than CLI args).
    18→  PUSH_MARKER_MODE    Marker mode: none|feature|ab.
    19→  PUSH_NON_INTERACTIVE If set to 1, skip interactive marker prompt.
    20→
    21→Local pre-hook search order (first match):
    22→  1) $PUSH_LOCAL_HOOK
    23→  2) ./.push.local.sh
    24→  3) ./scripts/push.local.sh
    25→
    26→Local post-hook search order (first match):
    27→  1) $PUSH_POST_HOOK
    28→  2) ./.push.post.sh
    29→  3) ./scripts/push.post.sh
    30→USAGE
    31→}

    33→trim() {
    34→  local v="$1"
    35→  v="${v#"${v%%[![:space:]]*}"}"
    36→  v="${v%"${v##*[![:space:]]}"}"
    37→  printf '%s' "$v"
    38→}

    40→json_escape() {
    41→  local s="$1"
    42→  s=${s//\\/\\\\}
    43→  s=${s//"/\\"}
    44→  s=${s//$'\n'/\\n}
    45→  s=${s//$'\r'/\\r}
    46→  s=${s//$'\t'/\\t}
    47→  printf '%s' "$s"
    48→}

    50→load_marker_options() {
    51→  local options_file="$1"
    52→  local marker_type="$2"
    53→
    54→  if [[ ! -f "$options_file" ]]; then
    55→    return 0
    56→  fi
    57→
    58→  if ! command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    59→    return 0
    60→  fi
    61→
    62→  node -e '
    63→const fs = require("fs");
    64→const file = process.argv[1];
    65→const key = process.argv[2];
    66→try {
    67→  const raw = fs.readFileSync(file, "utf8");
    68→  const json = JSON.parse(raw);
    69→  const arr = Array.isArray(json[key]) ? json[key] : [];
    70→  for (const item of arr) {
    71→    if (typeof item === "string" && item.trim()) {
    72→      console.log(item.trim());
    73→    }
    74→  }
    75→} catch (_) {}
    76→' "$options_file" "$marker_type"
    77→}
    78→
    79→prompt_marker_value() {
    80→  local marker_type="$1"
    81→  local options_file="$2"
    82→  local value=""
    83→  local opts=()
    84→  local line=""
    85→
    86→  while IFS= read -r line; do
    87→    opts+=("$line")
    88→  done < <(load_marker_options "$options_file" "$marker_type")
    89→
    90→  if [[ ${#opts[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then
    91→    echo "请选择 ${marker_type}：" >&2
    92→    echo "0. 手动输入" >&2
    93→    local i=1
    94→    for item in "${opts[@]}"; do
    95→      echo "${i}. ${item}" >&2
    96→      i=$((i + 1))
    97→    done
    98→
    99→    read -r -p "请输入 ${marker_type} 选项序号（或直接输入名称，回车=手动输入）: " marker_choice
   100→    marker_choice=$(trim "${marker_choice:-}")
   101→
   102→    if [[ "$marker_choice" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]] && [[ "$marker_choice" -ge 1 ]] && [[ "$marker_choice" -le ${#opts[@]} ]]; then
   103→      value="${opts[$((marker_choice - 1))]}"
   104→      echo "$value"
   105→      return 0
   106→    fi
   107→
   108→    if [[ -n "$marker_choice" && ! "$marker_choice" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
   109→      value="$marker_choice"
   110→      echo "$value"
   111→      return 0
   112→    fi
   113→  fi
   114→
   115→  read -r -p "请输入 ${marker_type} 名称(直接回车取消): " value
   116→  value=$(trim "$value")
   117→  echo "$value"
   118→}

   272→# --- 部署名称/服务名处理 ---
   273→# .deploy-service: 用于 deploy 默认服务名（推荐）

   276→deploy_service_file=".deploy-service"

   281→# 历史兼容：旧版本会把部署配置写入 .gitignore，导致不同项目/分支共享本地配置。

   284→  gitignore_tmp=$(mktemp)
   285→  awk -v s="$deploy_service_file" -v n="$deploy_name_file" -v p="$deploy_path_file" '
   286→    $0 == s || $0 == n || $0 == p { next }

   288→  ' ".gitignore" > "$gitignore_tmp"
   289→
   290→  if ! cmp -s ".gitignore" "$gitignore_tmp"; then

   292→    reconfigure_deploy=1
   293→    echo "已从 .gitignore 移除旧部署忽略项: $deploy_service_file, $deploy_name_file, $deploy_path_file"

   299→if [[ "$reconfigure_deploy" == "1" ]]; then

   304→    current_deploy_name=$(cat "$deploy_name_file")
   305→  fi
   306→  echo "检测到历史忽略配置，为避免部署名称冲突，请重新确认。"
   307→  read -r -p "请输入项目部署名 (当前: ${current_deploy_name:-未配置}，直接回车保持不变): " input_name
   308→  if [[ -n "$input_name" ]]; then

   358→# ----- version increment (generic) -----
   359→increment_version() {
   360→  local branch=$1
   361→  local format_type=$2
   362→
   363→  local pattern_standard="([0-9]+\\.[0-9]+)\\.([0-9]+)"
   364→  local pattern_extended="([0-9]+\\.[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+)\\.([0-9]+)"
   365→  local pattern_three_parts="([0-9]+\\.[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+)$"
   366→  local pattern_two_parts="([0-9]+\\.[0-9]+)$"
   367→
   368→  if [[ $format_type == "extended" && $branch =~ $pattern_extended ]]; then
   369→    local main_version="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
   370→    local sub_version="${BASH_REMATCH[2]}"
   371→    local new_sub_version=$((sub_version + 1))
   372→    echo "${main_version}.${new_sub_version}"
   373→  elif [[ $format_type == "auto" && $branch =~ $pattern_extended ]]; then
   374→    local main_version="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
   375→    local sub_version="${BASH_REMATCH[2]}"
   376→    local new_sub_version=$((sub_version + 1))
   377→    echo "${main_version}.${new_sub_version}"
   378→  elif [[ $format_type == "extended" && $branch =~ $pattern_three_parts ]]; then
   379→    echo "${branch}.1"
   380→  elif [[ $format_type != "extended" && $branch =~ $pattern_standard ]]; then
   381→    local main_version="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
   382→    local sub_version="${BASH_REMATCH[2]}"
   383→    local new_sub_version=$((sub_version + 1))
   384→    echo "${main_version}.${new_sub_version}"
   385→  elif [[ $format_type == "extended" && $branch =~ $pattern_two_parts ]]; then
   386→    echo "${branch}.0.1"
   387→  elif [[ $branch =~ $pattern_two_parts ]]; then
   388→    echo "${branch}.1"
   389→  else
   390→    echo "${branch}"
   391→  fi
   392→}

   509→  if [[ -x "$pre_hook_path" ]]; then
   510→    "$pre_hook_path" "$repo_root" "$current_branch" "$project_name" "$old_branch"
   511→  else
   512→    bash "$pre_hook_path" "$repo_root" "$current_branch" "$project_name" "$old_branch"
   513→  fi
   514→fi
   515→
   516→# Stage all changes
   517→if ! git diff --quiet || ! git diff --cached --quiet; then
   518→  git add -A
   519→fi
   520→
   521→# Commit if there are staged changes
   522→if git diff --cached --quiet; then
   523→  echo "没有可提交的变更"
   524→else
   525→  if [[ -z "$commit_message" ]]; then
   526→    read -r -p "请输入提交信息: " commit_message
   527→  fi
   528→  if [[ -z "$commit_message" ]]; then
   529→    echo "提交信息不能为空"
   530→    exit 1
   531→  fi
   532→  git commit -m "$commit_message"
   533→fi
   534→
   535→# Push
   536→if git rev-parse --abbrev-ref --symbolic-full-name @{u} >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   537→  git push
   538→else
   539→  git push -u origin "$current_branch"
   540→fi
   541→
   542→# Collect changed files from last commit (if any)
   543→changed_files=""
   544→if git rev-parse HEAD~1 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   545→  changed_files=$(git diff --name-only HEAD~1 HEAD | tr '\n' ',' | sed 's/,$//')
   546→fi
   547→
   548→# Notify (Feishu)
   549→if [[ -n "${FEISHU_WEBHOOK:-}" && "$notify_flag" != "no" ]]; then
   550→  if [[ "${PUSH_NOTIFY:-0}" != "1" ]]; then
   551→    read -r -p "是否发送飞书通知? (y/N): " notify_choice
   552→    if [[ "${notify_choice}" != "y" && "${notify_choice}" != "Y" ]]; then
   553→      notify_choice=""
   554→    fi
   555→  else
   556→    notify_choice="y"
   557→  fi
   558→
   559→  if [[ -n "$notify_choice" ]]; then
   560→    notify_content="${commit_message:-已推送}"
   561→    marker_notify=""
   562→    if [[ "$marker_mode" == "feature" ]]; then
   563→      marker_notify="\\nFeature: ${marker_value}"
   564→    elif [[ "$marker_mode" == "ab" ]]; then
   565→      marker_notify="\\nAB: ${marker_value}"
   566→    fi
   567→    curl -sS -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
   568→      -d "{\"msg_type\": \"text\", \"content\": {\"text\": \"🚀 推送通知\\n项目: ${project_name}\\n分支: ${current_branch}${marker_notify}\\n提交信息: ${commit_message:-无}\\n更新文件: ${changed_files}\"}}" \
   569→      "$FEISHU_WEBHOOK" >/dev/null
   570→    echo "飞书通知已发送"
   571→  fi
   572→fi
   573→
   574→# Local post-hook (optional)
   575→if [[ -n "$post_hook_path" ]]; then
   576→  echo "执行本地 Post Hook: $post_hook_path"
   577→  if [[ -x "$post_hook_path" ]]; then
   578→    "$post_hook_path" "$repo_root" "$current_branch" "$project_name" "$old_branch"
   579→  else
   580→    bash "$post_hook_path" "$repo_root" "$current_branch" "$project_name" "$old_branch"
   581→  fi
   582→fi
